title: 以下、進めて。本番環境で動作するか確認せよ。 • 解決しました。Hybrid Failover の即 fail 文言は AGENTS.md で recovery matrix 前提に修正し、run- kernel-council-review.sh には実際の recovery retry を追加しました。最初の council 判定が落ちて も、1 回だけ force_copilot_continuity + gemini/xai backfill + metered override で再試行し、それ でもだめなときだけ fail します。あわせて test-shadow-continui...
summary_text: Highest-likelihood hidden blockers that still remain after the shadow continuity policy commit: 1. `codex-implement` may never start, so council recovery is never exercised. `fugue-tutti-caller` requires all of: `allow_heavy=true`, `has_implement_request=true`, `has_implement_confirmed=true`, and `tutti.ok_to_execute=true`. If Tutti still outputs `missing-claude` and `ok_to_execute=false`, verification stops before council. [fugue-tutti-caller.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-caller.yml#L831) [fugue-tutti-caller.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-caller.yml#L835) 2. Dispatch can be suppressed at context gate even with latest code. `should_run=false` if required labels are missing (`fugue-task` + `tutti`) or strict offline hold condition is hit. [resolve-orchestration-context.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/resolve-orchestration-context.sh#L319) [resolve-orchestration-context.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/resolve-orchestration-context.sh#L324) 3. Trust gate can block all Tutti lanes. If dispatch actor is not write/maintain/admin (or canary-verified), `trusted=false`; Tutti run-agents/integration won’t run, so no `ok_to_execute` for implement handoff. [fugue-tutti-router.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-router.yml#L608) [fugue-tutti-router.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-router.yml#L610) 4. Ref drift is still possible in council execution path. `fugue-codex-implement` checks out `.fugue-orchestrator` without explicit `ref`, then runs council from that checkout. If you dispatch from a branch, runner may execute default-branch scripts instead of pushed branch changes. [fugue-codex-implement.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-codex-implement.yml#L500) [fugue-codex-implement.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-codex-implement.yml#L737) 5. Recovery pass still depends on real credential shape. Recovery attempt forcibly switches to `force_copilot_continuity + wants_gemini/xai + metered_reason=overflow`; if Copilot token type is unsupported or Gemini/xAI path is unavailable, first-fail may remain fail. [run-kernel-council-review.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/run-kernel-council-review.sh#L186) [ensure-copilot-cli.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/ensure-copilot-cli.sh#L146) [subscription-agent-runner.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/subscription-agent-runner.sh#L837) 6. Manual missing-provider override cannot reproduce `missing-claude` path. Current override is constrained to `glm` only; attempts to force `claude` are normalized to `none`. [run-kernel-council-review.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/run-kernel-council-review.sh#L79) If your verification plan is “push + dispatch caller + minimal inspection,” blocker #1 is the most likely stopper.
